description: Pilot study-level RTL/RTS endpoint construct coding for pillar2-005 Putukian hunt papers (23 pinned). Putukian supplemental included-study list (Table L) is out of scope for this installment.

putukian_review_operational_definitions.days_until_symptom_free: Complete resolution of symptoms at rest associated with the current concussion.
putukian_review_operational_definitions.days_until_RTL: Completion of the RTL strategy with return to pre-injury learning activities with no new academic support.
putukian_review_operational_definitions.days_until_full_RTS: Completion of the RTS strategy with no symptoms and no clinical findings at rest or maximal exertion suggesting inability to return.
putukian_review_operational_definitions.source_quote_excerpt: we used the following definitions: (1) days until symptom free is defined as the complete resolu- tion of symptoms at rest that are associated with the current concussion; (2) days until RTL is defined as completion of the RTL strategy with return to pre- injury learning activities with no new academic support; (3) days until full RTS is defined as completion of the RTS strategy with no symptoms and no clin- ical findings that are associated with the current concussion at rest and with maximal p

rows.title: Clinical recovery from concussion-return to school and sport: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Pooled RTL: completion of RTL strategy, return to pre-injury learning without new academic support (review-level definition).
rows.rts_endpoint_note: Pooled RTS: completion of RTS strategy, no symptoms at rest or maximal exertion, no findings blocking return (review-level definition).

rows.title: Premature return to play and return to learn after a sport-related concussion: physician's chart review.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Premature RTL = returned to school before completing all graduated-return steps (chart review).
rows.rts_endpoint_note: Premature RTP = returned to sport before completing all graduated-return steps.

rows.title: Relapse of concussion symptoms in the context of premature return to learn and return to play.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Same premature-RTL construct as Carson 2014; compares 2006–2011 vs 2011–2016 eras.
rows.rts_endpoint_note: Premature RTP before protocol completion; relapse outcome.

rows.title: What Comes First: Return to School or Return to Activity for Youth After Concussion?
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Median 35 d to full school reintegration (staged protocol) — coded from published abstract; PDF pending.
rows.rts_endpoint_note: Median 38 d to full activity/contact protocol completion — coded from published abstract; PDF pending.

rows.title: Outpatient follow-up and return to school after emergency department evaluation among children with persistent post-concussion symptoms.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: ED cohort; return-to-school timing after persistent symptoms — not CISG step-4 full day.

rows.title: Postconcussion Academic Support in Children Who Attend a Primary Care Provider Follow-up Visit after Presenting to the Emergency Department.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Academic support and accommodations after PCP follow-up — intermediate RTL constructs.

rows.title: Factors Influencing Primary Care Follow-Up After Pediatric Mild Traumatic Brain Injury.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Follow-up attendance predictors; not RTL/RTS timing endpoints.

rows.title: Quality of Life and Symptom Burden 1 Month After Concussion in Children and Adolescents.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: PDF pending in hunt inbox.

rows.title: Assessing the Clinical Utility of the Question, "Is Your Child/Are You Back to Normal?" in Pediatric Concussion Symptom Resolution.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: PDF pending — likely patient-reported 'back to normal' vs CISG step labels.

rows.title: Early Subthreshold Aerobic Exercise for Sport-Related Concussion: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Primary: symptom recovery / BCTT threshold — not RTL step timing.
rows.rts_endpoint_note: Primary: exercise tolerance — not RTS step completion.

rows.title: Feasibility of a postacute structured aerobic exercise intervention following sport concussion in symptomatic adolescents.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Fixed %HRmax ramp — Logic C anchor; RTL not modeled.
rows.rts_endpoint_note: Symptom resolution by session 4 median — not RTS steps.
rows.canonical_pdf: data/papers/Micay et al. - 2018 - Feasibility of a postacute structured aerobic exercise intervention following sport concussion in sy.pdf

rows.title: Early aerobic exercise among adolescents at moderate/high risk for persistent post-concussion symptoms: A pilot randomized clinical trial.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Pilot RCT — PPCS symptom trajectory, not RTL staging.
rows.canonical_pdf: data/papers/Howell et al. (2022) - Early Aerobic Exercise Among Adolescents at ModerateHigh Risk for Persistent Post-concussion Symptoms - Marked .pdf

rows.title: Influence of Aerobic Exercise Volume on Postconcussion Symptoms.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Weekly minutes threshold (≥160 min/wk) vs symptoms — volume, not RTL steps.
rows.canonical_pdf: data/papers/Howell et al. (2021) - Influence of Aerobic Exercise Volume on Postconcussion Symptoms (1).pdf

rows.title: Factors Associated with Symptom Resolution after Aerobic Exercise Intervention in Adolescent and Young Adults with Concussion.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Notes concurrent school + exercise difficulty — no RTL step endpoint.
rows.rts_endpoint_note: Symptom resolution ≤28 d — not RTS clearance.
rows.canonical_pdf: data/papers/Wingerson et al. - 2024 - Factors Associated with Symptom Resolution after Aerobic Exercise Intervention in Adolescent and You.pdf

rows.title: Factors Associated With Problems for Adolescents Returning to the Classroom After Sport-Related Concussion.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Classroom return problems and accommodations — early/partial RTL constructs.
rows.rts_endpoint_note: Mean return to sport ~4 weeks post-injury — clearance/play timing, not CISG step 6.

rows.title: Quantifying Activity Levels After Sport-Related Concussion Using Actigraph and Mobile (mHealth) Technologies.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Activity monitoring — not RTL endpoint.

rows.title: Concussion Referral and Practice Patterns by Pediatric Emergency Medicine Providers.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: PDF pending — PEM referral patterns.

rows.title: Pilot Study of Telehealth Delivered Rehabilitative Exercise for Youth With Concussion: MSTEP.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Exercise telehealth pilot — symptom/functional outcomes.

rows.title: Mobile Subthreshold Exercise Program (MSTEP) for concussion: study protocol for a randomized controlled trial.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Protocol paper — no RTL/RTS timing results.
rows.canonical_pdf: data/papers/Chrisman et al. (2022) - Mobile Subthreshold Exercise Program (MSTEP) for concussion (1).pdf

rows.title: The Effects of Rest on Concussion Symptom Resolution and Recovery Time: A Meta-analytic Review.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Meta-analysis of rest duration vs symptom resolution — not RTL staging.

rows.title: Diagnosing and managing paediatric concussion: Key recommendations for general paediatricians and family doctors.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Guideline: full RTL without accommodations before sport clearance — aligns with Amsterdam step-4 gate.
rows.rts_endpoint_note: Return to sport requires medical clearance; stepwise sport protocol referenced.

rows.title: Returning to school following concussion: Pointers for family physicians from the Living Guideline for Pediatric Concussion Care.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: Symptom-guided gradual RTL; 2–3 d rest then stepwise school return — no 24 h/step floor.

rows.title: Effectiveness of return to activity and return to school protocols for children postconcussion: a systematic review.
rows.rtl_endpoint_note: SR uses RTS label for return-to-school and RTA for activity — endpoint heterogeneity exemplar.
rows.rts_endpoint_note: RTA protocol completion (note inverted naming vs CISG).

scope_boundary.rationale: Fixed hunt pilot only; not a re-extraction of Putukian's 278-study list.

optional_updates.note: Optional: verify remaining hunt rows when PDFs arrive.
